introSection: Fireball is a steel 4th Dimension roller coaster located at Adventureland in Farmingdale, New York, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Fireball was announced in November 2021.

Fireball opened on May 21, 2022 as the first Roller Ball built by Ride Engineers Switzerland in North America.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride stands tall, including its marquee sign.

fullText:
Fireball is a steel 4th Dimension roller coaster located at Adventureland in Farmingdale, New York, USA.

Fireball was announced in November 2021.

Fireball opened on May 21, 2022 as the first Roller Ball built by Ride Engineers Switzerland in North America.

The ride stands tall, including its marquee sign.

Riders sit facing back-to-back.
